prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1GD-FTV 2.8L turbo-diesel with a BorgWarner EFR 8374 turbocharger (1.05 A/R, 62mm inducer) paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a GReddy Profec boost controller for 32 psi peak boost, targeting 280 hp at the wheels with a Motec M150 ECU managing fueling via 1,000cc Denso GDI injectors and a custom 3-inch intercooler piping kit from HKS

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a TRD 8th-gen Hilux 4.875:1 rear differential with a Cusco 2-way LSD, upgraded driveshafts from Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly), and a Tilton twin-disc clutch with a 240mm billet flywheel for the 6-speed automatic transmission (AC60E) converted to paddle-shift control via a Paddle Shift Solutions kit

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for 3,500kg GVWR), polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the front control arms, and a custom 30mm front sway bar from Whiteline (part #BMR78XZ) paired with a 25mm rear sway bar to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering on JDM-spec 225/40R19 Yokohama Advan Sport A052 tires mounted on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x8.5 +35 offset)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (Hiace-specific, part #RB-HIACE-SC) with carbon fiber overfenders, custom front splitter, and a duckbill rear wing (all unpainted raw carbon), paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (part #TOY-HIACE-SC-HOOD) featuring a functional NACA duct for intercooler airflow

Custom LED lighting package including DRLs from LUX Automotive (part #LUX-HIACE-DRL) integrated into the front bumper, a full-width rear light bar from Diode Dynamics (part #DD-HIACE-RL), and a custom interior ambient lighting system from VLEDS (part #VLEDS-HIACE-AMB) with RGBW control via a Greddy e-Manage Ultimate

Interior transformation with Recaro Sportster CS seats (part #391-000) in Alcantara with red stitching, a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay from 3D Carbon (part #3D-HIACE-DASH) with a digital gauge cluster from AIM MXS Strada (part #AIM-MXS-STRADA) displaying boost, AFR, and oil pressure
